1761970.name: iB Cricket Business Companion
1761970.description:
This application acts as a companion to the iB Cricket business license holders and helps them set the match configuration, create profiles for new users and more.

Match Configuration:
Based on the customer request, the Business license holder can customise the configuration of the match such as Bowling level, Pitch Type, Stadium, Weather conditions and more

User Profile:
The business license holders can enter the user details and create the profile and start the match requires an Indian phone to play the game.

Ad Preview:
In this section of the application, users can check out the preview of the in-game ads.
1761970.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
